calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-13-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-09-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Permitting Pretrial Discovery Regarding Defendants Financial Condition Pursuant To Cal Civ Code 3295c
Off Calendar May-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. NATHAN VERBISCAR-BROWN, Esq. of Steven Adair Mac Donald & Partners, P.C. (Tel: 415-956-6488) for plaintiffs;
Atty. JOHN CHU, Esq. of Corporate Counsel Law Group, LLP (Tel: 415-989-5300) for defendants Tat Man Lau, Qiu Feng Li, and Donna Szeto.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS NAHUA CHEN, XIUYING CUI, and NAJUN CHEN's Motion For Order Permitting Pretrial Discovery Regarding Defendants Financial Condition Pursuant To Cal Civ Code 3295c.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFFS' NAHUA CHEN, XIUYING AND NAJUN CHEN MOTION FOR AN ORDER PERMITTING PRETRIAL DISCOVERY REGARDING DEFENDANTS' TAT MAN LAU AND QUI FENG LI FINANCIAL CONDITION PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 3295 IS GRANTED. AFTER A REVIEW OF THE ENTIRE RECORD AND THE DECLARATIONS SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS, THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFFS HAVE SHOWN A STRONG LIKELIHOOD THAT THEY WILL PREVAIL ON THE CLAIM AS REQUIRED BY CCP SEC. 3295(c).

THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF WITH THE MOTION.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2023 Set For Trial On Oct-30-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
